examples: The traffic was stationary due to three sets of roadwork in less than a mile.
Roadwork is a novel of societal conflict, man vs. progress.
But roadwork is necessary for keeping streets and highways in good repair or improving traffic flow.
This includes keeping lanes open between 07:30 and 18:00 and only having overnight roadwork closures.
According to Doughty, tweets help, but heavy roadwork is still what matters most.
